login.subtitle: Sign in to continue
login.heroDescription: The easiest way to carry your personal business card.

forgotPassword.title: Recover Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address to receive recovery instructions.
forgotPassword.successMessage: An email has been sent to reset your password.
forgotPassword.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
forgotPassword.userNotFound: The email address is not registered in our system.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Enter the code you received and your new password.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

resetPassword.success: Your password has been updated successfully.

editProfile.saveDescription: Do you want to save a copy to the cloud?
editProfile.deleteDescription: Do you want to delete your profile locally or also in the cloud?

errors.mandatoryFields: Please fill in all mandatory fields (*).
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.networkFallback: Could not connect to the server, but it will be saved locally.
errors.passwordRequired: Password is required to create a profile.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

tooltips.profileImage: Profile photo is optional. You can upload one now or later.
tooltips.professionalTitle: Your current role or the title that best describes your primary professional function.
tooltips.briefBio: Briefly describe your experience, key skills, or professional ethos. Max 200 characters.
tooltips.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 8 characters long, including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.
tooltips.syncPending: This profile only exists on your phone. To back it up and access it from other devices, choose 'Local + Cloud' when editing.

success.localOnlySuccess: Profile saved on device. It has not been synced to the cloud.

errors.networkError: Could not connect to the server.
